---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new experiment, feature, or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or experiment you'd like to see.

## 🎓 Educational Value

How does this feature benefit students or educators?

- Which physics topic(s) does it cover?
- What grade level / curriculum is it aimed at?
- What concept will students better understand after this?

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this implemented.

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

- Unity components or packages needed?
- Performance implications for Meta Quest 3?
- Any known similar implementations (links, references)?

## 📚 Resources / References

Links to physics curriculum standards, papers, or existing simulations.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## 💼 Priority

- [ ] Must Have (v1.0)
- [ ] Should Have (v1.x)
- [ ] Nice to Have (future)
